name: Chocolate Chocolate-Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Sift together flour and baking soda and set aside.
With an electric mixer, cream the butter until smooth. Add vanilla extract and both sugars, beating to combine well. Add cocoa powder and beat to mix well on low speed. Gradually add the cream and sifted dry ingredients, mixing only until combined.
Stir in pecans and chocolate chips with a wooden spoon.
Using a rounded spoonful (less than heaping), place cookies 1 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. It is best to line the baking sheet with aluminum foil first. Bake for 12-13 minutes. Allow cookies to cool before transferring to a wire rack.
